title: astragalus leucocladus
intro: Astragalus leucocladus, also known as white-stemmed milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus leucocladus include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other herbs and used in tea, capsule, or tincture form to support overall well-being.
